docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,663.00 FILED BY CCSF - OFFICE OF TREASURER/TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT DE BELLIS, GINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-28-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-28-2025 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-25-2025 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DOLORES BASTIAN DALTON. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF CCSF-OFFICE OF TREASURER/TAX COLLECTOR (MELANIE BETTIS) IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GINA DE BELLIS IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE RE: PROOF OF SERVICE
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MELANIE BETTIS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF - OFFICE OF TREASURER/TAX COLLECTOR
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JUSTIN HOLMES FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF - OFFICE OF TREASURER/TAX COLLECTOR

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF CCSF-OFFICE OF TREASURER/TACX COLLECTOR IS PRESENT. JUSTIN HOLMES APPEARING ON BEHALF OF THE PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT GINA DE BELLIS IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
